prompt:
You are an Amazon SP-API listing specialist and an expert at writing search-engine-optimized (SEO) Amazon listings. For the product below, write an item_name of AT MOST 75 characters and a title_differentiation of AT MOST 125 characters. Always return both, each within its own limit. === PRODUCT CONTEXT === SKU: SON-3PCPLASTICSIFTSET-GRN-BUN Product Type: METAL_DETECTOR Brand (from catalog): ASR Outdoor Existing Title: ASR Outdoor 3pc DEEP STACKING Classifier Screen Set with Handles, Heavy Duty 5 Gallon Plastic Sifting Sieve (1/2, 1/4, 1/8) Description: Make classifying large amounts of raw material easy with the deep stacking ASR Outdoor 3pc sifting classifier screen set. Featuring built in side handles, durable polypropylene plastic material construction and designed to be stacked on top of a 3 or 5 gallon bucket, these all plastic classifier screens will allow you to easily remove unwanted raw material from paydirt, gems, rocks or other valuables.

Specifications:

- Mesh Sizes: 1/2 inch, 1/4 inch, 1/8 inch - Top Diameter: 13.25 inches - Bottom Diameter: 10 inches - Depth: 6 inches - Material: High Impact Plastic

Whether for gold prospecting equipment or rock hounding equipment, these dry sift screens make classification of unwanted raw materials easy. Simply stack the three sifting screens on top of each other, and then on top of a 3 or 5 gallon bucket; start with the 1/2 inch classifier on the top, followed by the 1/4 inch in the middle, and then the 1/8 inch at the bottom. Once you’ve added your raw material, flush with water; this will push smaller, valuable paydirt down through to the bucket ready for panning or sluicing, while keeping large unwanted organic material, like rocks, gravels, plant matter and aggregates out.

Two beneficial design features include the 6 inch pan depth and built in handles. With six inches of depth you can process much more raw material in comparison to a shallower classifier screen. And, when carrying and working with heavier and large amounts of material, you'll appreciate the built in handles, making the plastic sifting screen easier to maneuver and easier on the hands.

ASR Outdoor heavy duty plastic sifting screens are made of tough polypropylene plastic that will see you through many gold prospecting seasons to come. The high quality plastic material will never rust, making it a great classifier suitable for all types of weather. To keep in best condition, rinse and air dry between uses. Search Terms: mealworm sifter garden Rock hounding gold prospecting equipment gardening tools foraging bag dry sift screen soil sifter paydirt sluice box mining kit gem stones gold pan 5 gallon bucket geology rock screening pan Features: - 3PC CLASSIFYING SIFTING SCREENS: Set includes (3) plastic classifier screens with 1/2, 1/4 and 1/8 inch mesh sizes; these heavy duty rock screening pans are ideal for raw material classification and are compatible with all other ASR Outdoor sifting screens - 5 GALLON BUCKET CLASSIFER: Gold rush plastic sifting screens have been designed to stack on top of a 3 or 5 gallon bucket, creating a vertical classification system that allows for the easy removal of unwanted raw material from valuable paydirt - FUNCTIONAL SIDE HANDLES: When classifying large amounts of raw material in the field, especially when using these deep classifiers, the built in side handles will make carrying, moving and sifting much easier and less strenuous on hands, arms and back - DURABLE CONSTRUCTION: Made from durable polypropylene plastic, these plastic dry sift screens will stand up to lots of wear and tear in the field; rust and UV resistant, rinse and air dry between uses - SPECIFICATIONS: Top Diameter: 13.25 inches; Bottom Diameter: 10 inches; Depth: 6 inches; Set Weight: 4.42lbs; Color: Green === ITEM_NAME (title, <= 75 chars) === Write a concise, keyword-rich, SEO-optimized item_name — a shopper-facing title, not a part number. Derive these tokens, then assemble the title from them in order: ${brand} ${pack_size}-${pack_size_unit} ${size} ${color} ${name} - brand: use the catalog brand above. - pack_size + pack_size_unit: parse from the existing title (e.g. "4-pk", or a dimension like 13" -> pack_size "13", pack_size_unit "in"). Omit if absent. - size, color, name: parse from the existing title (name = what the product IS). Drop any token you cannot determine; never emit the SKU, MPN, or a part number. Lead with the brand; condense to AT MOST 75 characters. Amazon schema guidance: Provide a title for the item that may be customer facing === TITLE_DIFFERENTIATION (item highlight, 100–125 chars) === Write a compact, comma-separated list of the product's strongest, most search-relevant features/benefits — NOT a full sentence, NOT the brand, and NOT a repeat of the item_name (e.g. "Set of 6, Dishwasher Safe, 8oz, BPA-Free, Stackable"). Use the available space: aim for 100–125 characters, leading with the highest-value keywords. Never pad with filler or repeat a point. Capitalize the first letter of every word (e.g. "Natural Wood Grain", but keep acronyms like "US" fully uppercase). Do not use special characters — spell out "&" as "and" and "=" as "is" (e.g. "Yellow Is Real", "Works On US And International Currency"); only hyphen, double quote, and apostrophe are allowed. Amazon schema guidance: Provide product features or benefit driven phrases, not a full sentence. Information will appear only when the item name is under 75 characters. Do not repeat information already in the item name. === RETURN === Return ONLY a valid JSON object, no markdown fences, in this exact shape: {"item_name": "<= 75 char title", "tokens": {"brand": "", "pack_size": "", "pack_size_unit": "", "size": "", "color": "", "name": ""}, "title_differentiation": "<= 125 char benefit phrase"}

anthropic.item_name: ASR Outdoor 3pc Green Plastic Sifting Classifier Screen Set

openai.item_name: ASR Outdoor 3pc Green Deep Stacking Classifier Screen Set

anthropic.title_differentiation: 12, 14, 18 Inch Mesh, Built-in Handles, 6 Inch Deep, Stackable 5 Gallon Bucket Compatible

openai.title_differentiation: Half Inch, Quarter Inch, Eighth Inch Mesh, Built In Handles, Fits 3 And 5 Gallon Buckets, Heavy Duty Polypropylene
